title: carduus onopordioides subsp. onopordioides
intro: Carduus onopordioides subsp. onopordioides, also known as the Kulan or Mongolian thistle, is a type of spiny thistle native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Carduus onopordioides subsp. onopordioides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
